title: Luxurious Creamy Italian Pork Carbonara
description: A rich and creamy Italian dish featuring pork, salted butter, and shio-koji cure, perfect for a romantic evening, this recipe is raw-friendly and formed into a traditional carbonara style.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of salted butter over medium heat and cook the shio-koji cured pork tenderloin until browned on all sides and cooked through.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside to rest, then add the remaining 2 tablespoons of salted butter to the skillet and cook until melted.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, parmesan cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the bowl and toss to combine with the egg mixture.
Slice the rested pork into thin strips and add to the bowl, tossing to combine with the spaghetti and egg mixture.
Season with freshly ground black pepper to taste, then garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
